calendar.matters:
DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-09-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT ANDY RUBI'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 5 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-27-2011 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-27-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ellen Chaitin.; Clerk: NBautista ; Not Reported. (D514)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Yerba Buena Commons, is present.
Attorney, Joseph Urbanski, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Andy Rubi, is present.
Attorney, Kevin Chen , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Tony Schoenberg, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 303A, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of MAY-02-2011 is vacated.
